description_long: This nightstand features a compact, rectangular form with a flat top surface suitable for placing small items. The front side displays a single drawer with a subtle, integrated handle, while the lower section is open, supported by four straight legs. The legs are connected by a distinctive curved crossbar, adding both stability and a touch of visual interest. The overall finish is smooth and matte, with a uniform dark gray coloration. Its minimalist design and sturdy construction make it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A compact, dark gray nightstand with a single drawer, open lower shelf, and curved crossbar legs. The design is minimalist and sturdy, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer and straight legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved crossbar connecting the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain panel and visible leg structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the curved crossbar and open lower section.
attribute_leg_design: straight legs with curved crossbar support
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
